predictedBugs: ai-init.ts: Stdin readLine() hangs if stdin is piped (non-TTY), causing the command to never complete in CI environments
requirements-audit.ts: Regex pattern for vague terms like 'etc' uses word boundary but may match inside words (e.g., 'etched') if not properly bounded
design-review.ts: Over-engineering pattern for 'GraphQL' matches comments and code examples, not just intentional architecture decisions, producing false positives
edgeCases: ai-init.ts: .env file has multiline values or values with spaces/quotes that break the simple key=value parser
requirements-audit.ts: requirements.md file with only HTML comments (no real content) would falsely score high on clarity structure check
design-review.ts: roadmap.md with code blocks containing technology keywords (like 'microservices' in a code sample) would trigger false over-engineering warnings
